Environment Sprites for Jude's World
=====================================

Style: High-resolution pixel art, Studio Ghibli warm golden-hour palette,
soft dappled sunlight, transparent background, anime pixel art style.

All images should be PNG with TRANSPARENT backgrounds.

Needed sprites:
---------------

TREES (256x256 or 256x320):
- tree.png    - Main tree, lush green canopy with warm highlights, brown trunk, grass tufts at base
- tree2.png   - Variant tree, slightly different shape/colors, maybe some blossoms
- tree3.png   - Smaller/different tree variety, perhaps with autumn-tinted leaves

CLOUDS (256x128):
- cloud1.png  - Fluffy Ghibli-style cloud, warm white with golden-hour tint
- cloud2.png  - Larger cloud, soft edges, slightly different shape
- cloud3.png  - Small wispy cloud

FLOWERS (64x64):
- flower1.png - Pink wildflower
- flower2.png - Yellow wildflower
- flower3.png - Purple wildflower
- flower4.png - Red wildflower

OPTIONAL:
- grass-tuft.png  - Small grass detail (64x32)
- bush.png        - Decorative bush (128x96)
- butterfly.png   - Animated butterfly sprite (64x64)

Prompt suggestion for AI image generation:
"High-resolution pixel art [object], Studio Ghibli warm golden-hour palette,
soft dappled sunlight, small grass tufts at base, transparent background,
256x256, anime pixel art style"
